title: ICAI Intermediate & Foundation Exam Results (January 2026) Expected Soon!
content:
# ICAI Intermediate & Foundation Exam Results (January 2026) Expected Soon!

Ek important update hai ICAI CA aspirants ke liye! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne announce kiya hai ki January 2026 mein hue Intermediate aur Foundation Examinations ke results jald hi declare hone wale hain.

Yeh ek crucial update hai un sabhi candidates ke liye jo apne results ka wait kar rahe hain.

*   **Examination:** Chartered Accountants Intermediate and Foundation Examinations.
*   **Exam Held In:** January 2026.
*   **Result Declaration Date:** Results are expected by the afternoon of March 8, 2026.
*   **Announcement Date:** This announcement was made by the ICAI Examination Department on March 2, 2026.
*   **How to Access:** Candidates can check their scorecards online via the official ICAI website, icai.nic.in. You will need your registration number and roll number as login credentials to access the results.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Announcement here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=20260302001)

*Published on: 7 March 2026*
